title: Etsy Announces Reverb Sale to Creator Partners and Servco
text: Etsy announced the sale of Reverb, its music gear marketplace, to Creator Partners and Servco in April 2025, returning it to independent ownership nearly six years after Etsy purchased the company for $275 million in cash. The decision to divest Reverb reflects Etsy's focus on core marketplace profitability and return on capital. Reverb generated $917.9 million in gross merchandise sales in 2024, down from $942.1 million the prior year, reflecting underperformance amid broader e-commerce challenges. The marketplace faced pressure from activist investor Elliott Management, which had pushed Etsy to improve profitability and focus on higher-margin operations. The sale of Reverb, completed in April 2025, was followed by the company's announcement of the Depop sale to eBay for $1.2 billion in February 2026. These divestitures represent a significant strategic shift for Etsy toward pure-play focus on its core marketplace and higher-margin services like advertising.
